payload.title: CLI SSE client + cursor-bearing change notifications
payload.description: The pull half needs an EventSource-style client in the CLI (Node has no native EventSource) that authenticates with the API key (Bearer) and parses the hub's SSE frames, with reconnect + exponential backoff and a catch-up pull on (re)connect. Ensure the hub's /events frames carry enough to drive an incremental pull - surface the {tenant, cursor} pointer (already published to the pgBus in hosted mode) onto the client SSE stream, or fall back to 'any change => pull since cursor'. Offline => the agent drops to interval polling; reconnect => resubscribe + catch up.
